common.footer: This email was sent by Afterdark.
common.unsubscribe: To unsubscribe from these emails, click here.

staffInvitation.subject: You've been invited to join the {clubName} team
staffInvitation.title: Team invitation
staffInvitation.body: {inviterName} invited you to join the {clubName} team on Afterdark.
staffInvitation.securityWordNote: Remember the security word you agreed on with your administrator.
staffInvitation.ignore: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.title: Reset password
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your account.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this change, ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Afterdark
welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.body: Your account was created successfully. You can now sign in.
